title: Every Single Sound In The World
description: Co-creator & Performer: Natalie PatuzzoCo-creator: Ali Wilson-GoldsmithCo-produced by: Chronic InsanityDramaturgy by: Chronic InsanityOutside Eyes: Emily Spiers & Liv Burton

reviews.reviewer: By The Reviews Hub - Brighton May 9, 2026 No Comments 2 Mins Read
reviews.rating_raw: The Reviews Hub Star Rating 80 % 80% A World of Wonder
reviews.excerpt: Noot arrives on earth with one simple mission, to collect every single sound the world has ever known. There’s only one problem – the world contains a lot more sounds than she could imagine! At some point she’ll need to report back to her home planet, Zaaaaaaaaarp. From puppets and pigs, to washing machines and meditations. Natalie Patuzzo has explored the potential soundscape with creativity and
